sections.heading: Our Mission
sections.body: The Melanin Institute is a global professional body dedicated to advancing skin-of-color dermatology and aesthetic medicine through education, mentorship, research and collaboration.

sections.heading: What We Offer
list: Strategic networking across Nigeria, Canada and international partners
Professional mentoring and clinical case review
Resources for inclusive practice standards and safer device use

sections.heading: Why It Matters
sections.body: Certain protocols and technologies that work for lighter skin tones can carry serious risk when applied to deeper pigments. We close this gap by providing focused expertise and clinician support to improve safety, effectiveness and patient satisfaction.
